GraphArn.description: The ARN of the behavior graph.

InvestigationId.description: The investigation ID of the investigation report.

EntityArn.description: The unique Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM user and IAM role.

EntityType.description: Type of entity. For example, IAM_ROLE or IAM_USER.

CreatedTime.description: The creation time of the investigation report in UTC time stamp format.

ScopeStartTime.description: The start date and time used to set the scope time within which you want Detective to investigate.

ScopeEndTime.description: The end date and time used to set the scope time within which you want Detective to investigate.

Status.description: The status based on the completion status of the investigation.

Severity.description: The severity assigned is based on the likelihood and impact of the indicators of compromise discovered in the investigation.

State.description: The current state of the investigation. An archived investigation indicates you have completed reviewing the investigation.
